task_completion.description: Verify the 'WINE DINNER TAX' at 11.5% was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'WINE DINNER TAX' with an 11.5% rate in the Back Office Tax Explorer, or verify the tax amount on the final order ticket is approximately $13.80 (which corresponds to 11.5% of $120).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'WINE DINNER' category and 'WINE DINNER COURSES' group were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'WINE DINNER' category and 'WINE DINNER COURSES' group in the Back Office Explorers, or as visible buttons in the POS terminal interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the three courses were created with correct prices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'AMUSE BOUCHE' ($18.00), 'BRAISED SHORT RIB' ($42.00), and 'CHOCOLATE FONDANT' ($16.00) in the Back Office Menu Items Explorer, or on the POS order ticket.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'WINE PAIRING' modifier group and its modifiers were created and linked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'WINE PAIRING' modifier group with 'SAUVIGNON BLANC' ($12.00), 'CABERNET RESERVE' ($18.00), and 'MOSCATO DESSERT' ($14.00) in the Back Office, or verify these modifiers appear under the respective courses on the POS order ticket.

task_completion.description: Verify a DINE IN order was entered with all three courses and their specified wine pairings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the POS order ticket. It should show a DINE IN order with AMUSE BOUCHE + SAUVIGNON BLANC, BRAISED SHORT RIB + CABERNET RESERVE, and CHOCOLATE FONDANT + MOSCATO DESSERT.

task_completion.description: Verify the order was settled with CASH and shows the correct totals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a settled ticket or payment screen showing CASH payment. The subtotal should be $120.00, tax approximately $13.80, and total approximately $133.80.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Floreant POS GUI for configuration and ordering.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Floreant POS Back Office and terminal windows, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (like 'ij' or 'sqlite3') inserting menu items, modifiers, or orders directly into the database.

integrity.description: Verify the final order ticket is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The order ticket should be displayed within the Floreant POS interface (either the terminal view or a receipt view), not mocked up in a text editor or image editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating: Tax 'WINE DINNER TAX' (11.5%); Category 'WINE DINNER'; Group 'WINE DINNER COURSES'; Menu Items 'AMUSE BOUCHE' ($18.00), 'BRAISED SHORT RIB' ($42.00), 'CHOCOLATE FONDANT' ($16.00); Modifier Group 'WINE PAIRING' (min 1, max 1) with modifiers 'SAUVIGNON BLANC' ($12.00), 'CABERNET RESERVE' ($18.00), 'MOSCATO DESSERT' ($14.00). The final DINE IN order must include all 3 courses with their respective wines, settled with CASH. Expected totals: Subtotal $120.00, Tax ~$13.80, Total ~$133.80.
